title: justicia areysiana
intro: Justicia areysiana, also known as Areys' Justicia or Wild Jasmine, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which contain flavonoids and terpenoids, and have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Justicia areysiana include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema.
